product_results.title: MAGIC JOHN 2 Pack for iPhone 16 Pro 6.3 inch Tempered Glass Screen Protector [Not Max], HD Clear, Bubble Free, Easy Installation, Auto Dust-Elimination

summary.text: Customers find the screen protector easy to install with amazing ease of installation and perfectly installed results. The functionality works very well with perfect results. However, durability presents concerns as some units cracked within a few days and the screen protector shattered. Customers have mixed opinions on quality, air bubbles, and screen size.

authors_reviews.title: Solid product, good protection, responsible price.
authors_reviews.text: Sweet. Easy to apply. Feels thinner than the expensive brand name and looks great.I had ordered 2 brand name’s before and they were great. However it’s probably me as my keys shattered one of the screen protectors and dropped my iPhone 16 pro the second time and the Brand name protector protected my iPhone perfectly.The protector was toast and the phone was perfect.I tried these quite frankly because of my apparent regular dropsy’s and the lower price.I am not disappointed so far.Drop update to follow. lol
authors_reviews.author: Brian Webb

authors_reviews.title: The best
authors_reviews.text: Best screen protectors they are easy to apply and great protection
authors_reviews.author: Leeshhaa

authors_reviews.title: The quality and strength are way below average
authors_reviews.text: I bought this 2-pack screen cover for my new phone because it showed how durable it is in the advertisement. Got it and installed, and it was very hard to get the bubbles out. Then later it split in the middle, top to bottom. I have it in my pants pocket with the car remote control. Second time dropping in my car with the phone holder from the window and chip out of the side. After I removed it from my phone, I tried the banding test, and it crashed immediately. I will repeat what the other said. I would hate to see what the advertised hammer claw they show in demo videos would do to my phone. The quality and strength are way below averageI'm extremely disappointed in this one
authors_reviews.author: Peter

authors_reviews.title: Excellent product!!
authors_reviews.text: I’m the one who CANNOT apply a screen saver. I decided to give this a shot & I’m so happy I did. This was easy to use & my new phone now has a properly applied screen saver. I made a slight mistake by hesitating when pulling the second tab & got a very small air bubble. We all know a small air bubble turns into a mess very quickly. I pulled it back as instructed & finished off by using the little tool they include. Voila! No air bubbles!! It’s a set of 2 so if this one messes up I have another. Very, very happy with this product!!
authors_reviews.author: shauna strong

authors_reviews.title: Very good screen protector
authors_reviews.text: Very easy and simple to install. Worth $20
authors_reviews.author: Astronaut

authors_reviews.title: Seems to be High Quality
authors_reviews.text: These seem to be really good! The screen protector feels really good and seems to be very scratch resistant so far anyways. My hands are never really clean when I use my phone and the screen doesn't seem to be covered in dirty fingerprints. The website says that this is a 15 second installation, but after cleaning and getting air bubbles under the screen protector it took me about 5-10 minutes to get it right. I would have given it a 5 star review if the installation worked like it does in their video.I'll update to see how long this screen protector lasts, I go though other brands in about 2-3 weeks.
authors_reviews.author: Scott Krawchuk

authors_reviews.title: Didn’t last long - updated
authors_reviews.text: I had gone through a set of protectors in one week, that set may have had some defects, they scratched easily, however there is a warranty and the company is replacing my first set at no cost!Update, got the replacement and it looks better applied too. Water slides right off it.
authors_reviews.author: Lory Milos

authors_reviews.title: Easy to use and excellent results
authors_reviews.text: Easy to use just watch the short video. It works exactly as andvertised and it’s a bubble free result.
authors_reviews.author: Peter D.
